source_note: Criteria reference numbers (e.g. CC6.1) and category names are factual identifiers from the AICPA Trust Services Criteria. The TSC is copyrighted by the AICPA; the descriptions below are original condensed summaries written for this demo and are NOT the official AICPA criteria or points of focus. For authoritative wording, consult the AICPA publication.

controls.title: Commitment to competence
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with objectives, including relevant training.

controls.title: Internal communication
controls.description: The entity internally communicates information, including security objectives and responsibilities, necessary to support the functioning of controls.

controls.title: External communication
controls.description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of controls.

controls.title: Risk identification and analysis
controls.description: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives and analyzes them as a basis for determining how the risks should be managed.

controls.title: Monitoring of controls
controls.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal control are present and functioning.

controls.title: Technology general controls
controls.description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: Logical access security measures
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures to protect information assets from unauthorized access.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: User registration and authorization
controls.description: Prior to issuing credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new users, and removes access when no longer required.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: Access based on roles and responsibilities
controls.description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data and resources based on roles, least privilege, and segregation of duties, with periodic review.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: Protection against external threats
controls.description: The entity implements controls to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries, including remote access protections.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: Restriction of information in transit
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized users and protects it during transmission.

controls.family: Common Criteria - Logical and Physical Access
controls.title: Prevention and detection of unauthorized software
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.

controls.title: Detection of vulnerabilities
controls.description: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify configuration changes and susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Monitoring for anomalies
controls.description: The entity monitors system components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors, and evaluates whether they represent security events.

controls.title: Evaluation of security events
controls.description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure to meet objectives and takes action accordingly.

controls.title: Incident response
controls.description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program to contain, remediate, and recover.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.

controls.title: Risk mitigation activities
controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions, including the use of insurance.

controls.title: Backup and recovery
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, implements, and maintains environmental protections, backup processes, and recovery infrastructure to meet availability objectives.

controls.title: Identification of confidential information
controls.description: The entity identifies and maintains information designated as confidential to meet its confidentiality objectives.

controls.title: Protection of confidential information
controls.description: The entity protects confidential information, including during retention and through secure disposal, to meet its confidentiality objectives.
